mapper.sql: id, openid, unionid, nickname, avatar, phone, real_name, email, role, gender, qualification, introduction, status, settings, last_login_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user ( openid, unionid, nickname, avatar, phone, real_name, email, role, gender, qualification, introduction, status, settings, last_login_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{openid}, #{unionid}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{phone}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{role}, #{gender}, #{qualification}, #{introduction}, #{status}, #{settings}, #{lastLoginTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_user ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE openid = #{openid}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE phone = #{phone}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_user ( openid, unionid, nickname, avatar, phone, real_name, email, role, gender, qualification, introduction, status, settings, last_login_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.openid}, #{item.unionid}, #{item.nickname}, #{item.avatar}, #{item.phone}, #{item.realName}, #{item.email}, #{item.role}, #{item.gender}, #{item.qualification}, #{item.introduction}, #{item.status}, #{item.settings}, #{item.lastLoginTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_user WHERE id IN
#{id}
